DP.275.0000:
[0103,0000]: What are you doing?
You’re not supposed to be here.\f
There’s nothing here anyway.\f
If anything were to happen, it’s in
my good hands.\f
I’ve got my trusty Pokémon with me
for one.\f
And more than anything, I’m tough,
and you know it!
DP.275.0001:
[0103,0000]: What’d I say?
I told you I’ll be OK by myself.\f
If you haven’t gone yet, go
challenge the Sunyshore Gym.\f
I have a feeling things are going
to keep getting tougher.\f
It could be rough if you don’t
collect up some Gym Badges.
